news.paragraph: The provided headline discusses the significant AI compute costs associated with a film production at Cannes, which is not directly related to Lululemon's core business or recent performance. Therefore, this news item offers no relevant context for trading LULU options. The market sentiment for LULU should be assessed based on its own business performance and outlook, not on unrelated industry trends.

headlines.title: This Cannes Film Cost $500,000 to Make. $400,000 Was AI Compute Costs.
